gold: Ya, ya, yo ya lo recibí.
predicted: Ya ya ya está, ya la recibí.
werNormalizedGold: ya ya yo ya lo recibí
werNormalizedPredicted: ya ya ya esta ya la recibi
sigWerNormalizedGold: ya ya yo ya lo recibí
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: ya ya ya esta ya la recibi

sigWerErrors.reason: The extra 'ya' does not significantly change the meaning, as it is a repetition of a filler word.
'yo' (I) and 'esta' (this) are completely different in meaning and change the subject of the sentence, which can derail the intended meaning.
